image:image.image:title: Clive Makazhu - Creator of NeuroLint & Developer Tools
image:image.image:caption: Clive Makazhu, creator of NeuroLint CLI - the tool that auto-fixes 700+ React/Next.js issues

image:image.image:title: What the K53 Test Is Actually Like (And Why People Fail It)

image:image.image:title: Getting a File From Your Laptop to Your Phone Should Not Be This Hard
image:image.image:caption: QuickBridge - peer-to-peer file transfer via WebRTC with no uploads or accounts required

image:image.image:title: FFmpeg Runs in the Browser Now, and I Built a Video Editor on Top of It
image:image.image:caption: CalmClip - browser-based video editor powered by FFmpeg WASM, no uploads required
